quotes.description: This is an XML File having anime quotes, and not just animes. So I have named it "show"

character.quote: "I wish to see the novel's epilogue."
"I refuse to give up as a reader"
"Ultimately, every human is their own writer."
"The story wouldn't end unless the reader gave up on the story"
"As long as they read something, humans won't be lonely."
"...I won't give up on this life. So don't give up either"
"He will be my companion and he will see the end of the scenario"
"The one who can save the world... it might be you, not me"
"It's no good to hold onto goals that are beyond your means."
"The more cowardly the puppy, the louder it barks."
"There is nothing to gain from getting close to me."
"Failure is inevitable, so let's challenge it happily!"
"Look at me. Even I can do a little bit now. The type of acting that devours everyone around me."
"That light has long been deeply engraved in my eyes."
